item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-n03","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":false,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant treated the prompt as a direct metric trend and logistics-switch decision problem, not as repeated local repair pressure. It did not invoke triage or Mindthus-style runtime framing, and it provided a practical decision framework covering attribution, metrics, thresholds, pilots, and final decision options."}
